summary: Email Template Refactoring - Iteration 12 testing completed. All backend tests pass (11/12, 1 skipped). TypeScript compiles cleanly. Login flow works end-to-end with login notification emails being sent. Code quality checks confirm: no 'Inter' font references, dynoPayGreetingTemplate not called (only defined), all 11 new helper functions exist, dark mode CSS covers all element types, system font stack used throughout.

minor.issue: 5 instances of raw 'color: #991b1b' remain in infoBox() content (lines 251, 289, 1145, 1243, 2160). These are section headers inside info boxes, not p() helper calls. May want to create a helper for these warning headers for consistency.

critical_code_review_comments: dynoPayGreetingTemplate is still exported (line 2779) for backwards compatibility with diagnosticsRouter - this is intentional and correct
Raw #991b1b color in 5 infoBox headers is a minor style inconsistency but doesn't affect dark mode (these are inside info-box which has dark mode CSS)

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 passed, 1 skipped due to Redis OTP timing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email template refactoring complete. All 59 email functions now use dynoPayEmailTemplate with helper functions (p, infoBox, dataRow, statusBadge, warnText, alertBox, errorBox, successBox, neutralBox, statCard, twoColumnStats, feeRow, feeTotalRow, feeTable, mono). Dark mode CSS in baseEmailTemplate covers all element types. System font stack (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif) used throughout instead of 'Inter'. Login notification emails sent on every successful login with device/browser/os/location info.
